scripts.dev: cargo run || bun -e "console.warn('[rust] Skipping cargo run: MSVC link.exe not found. Install Visual Studio Build Tools with the C++ workload to enable the Rust API.'); setInterval(() => {}, 1 << 30)"
scripts.lint: cargo clippy -- -D warnings || bun -e "console.warn('[rust] Skipping cargo clippy: cargo unavailable.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.lint:fix: cargo fmt || bun -e "console.warn('[rust] Skipping cargo fmt: cargo unavailable.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.format: cargo fmt || bun -e "console.warn('[rust] Skipping cargo fmt: cargo unavailable.'); process.exit(0)"
scripts.test: cargo test || bun -e "console.warn('[rust] Skipping cargo test: cargo/sqlx unavailable.'); process.exit(0)"
